footer.footerText: We are with you on the path of renting, buying, and selling villas, so that you can have a pleasant experience of choosing a memorable residence or investment with confidence and peace of mind.
footer.customerServicesText3: How do I register my residence?
footer.contactUsText3: Gilan, Rasht, Azadi Square, next to Azimizadeh Crossroads
footer.law: All material and intellectual property rights of this work are reserved for your brand.

heroSection.title: Find your dream home or favorite hotel here.
heroSection.description: From buying and selling property to short-term hotel and apartment rentals; easily search, compare, and make the best choice.

whyChooseUs.title: Why should you choose us?
whyChooseUs.text: Finding the right villa is not always easy. We are here to make things easy for you. From hundreds of files, we select only the best and most reliable options so that you do not waste your valuable time searching endlessly. Whether you are looking for a short-term vacation rental or thinking of buying or renting long-term, we introduce the best choices according to your budget and needs. Our 24-hour support and step-by-step guidance will ensure that you are never alone and find your dream villa with confidence.
